title: Not Enough Space
description: This is a modpack for the (private) Not Enough Space SMP
body:
A Group of Vanilla-Like mods put together for making the game feel just a little more fleshed out. We put this together to make it easier for our server players to download.

# List of Mods included (Including Libraries)
* [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)
* [Campanion](https://modrinth.com/mod/campanion)
* [Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm)
* [Cloth Config v6](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
* [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
* [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)
* [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
* [Fabric API (duh)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
* [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
* [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
* [Kibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/kibe)
* [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass)
* [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
* [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
* [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes)
* [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor)
* [Pingspam](https://modrinth.com/mod/pingspam)
* [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/mod/plasmo-voice)
* [Skip Transitions](https://modrinth.com/mod/skip-transitions)
* [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

And thank you, Modrinth Team, for this awesome platform, it's made not only downloading mods, but also putting together modpacks super simple. ~~Especially since we don't have to use Overwolf~~
